info.name: Acquia Cloud API - Application Performance Monitoring Services
Acquia Returns a List of Application Performance Monitoring Services Associated with the Environment.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The environment identifier. The identifier is a compound key consisting of the internal database ID of the environment and the application UUID.

items.docs: Returns a list of Application Performance Monitoring services associated with the environment.

info.name: Acquia Update Configuration for an Application Performance Monitoring Tool.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The environment identifier. The identifier is a compound key consisting of the internal database ID of the environment and the application UUID.

items.docs: Update configuration for an Application Performance Monitoring tool.

info.name: Acquia Returns a List of Application Performance Monitoring Services Associated with the Subscription.

params.name: subscriptionUuid
params.description: The subscription entity's universally unique identifier.

items.docs: Returns a list of Application Performance Monitoring services associated with the subscription.

info.name: Acquia Returns the Application Performance Monitoring Service Type Associated with the Subscription.

params.name: subscriptionUuid
params.description: The subscription entity's universally unique identifier.

items.docs: Returns the Application Performance Monitoring service type associated with the subscription.

info.name: Acquia Enables New Relic Pro APM License for All Applications on a Subscription.

params.name: subscriptionUuid
params.description: The subscription entity's universally unique identifier.

items.docs: Enables New Relic Pro APM license for all applications on a subscription. This authorizes Acquia to create a new user account on the third-party New Relic platform using the name and e-mail address of the organization owner.
